{{CargoRelic
|name=Faraday's Dynamo
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=12-18
|source=* Lottery Machine (0.07%), Novice Scrolls (1%), Tool Chest (2%), Wishing (2.6%)
* [[Indigent Nobleman]] (72k {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}})
* [[Jiro Toyato]] - [[Rare Rent]]
|description=On Dec 18, 1831, Faraday invented the world's first electric generator.

Through electromagnetic induction, Faraday made a homopolar generator. Its mechanism is different from modern power generators. It does not contain a coil but a copper disc that rotates in the magnetic field. It has a handle fixed at the center of the disc. The edge and center of the disc are connected to a brush which connects it to the ammeter with a wire. The copper disc is placed in the magnetic field of the hoof-shaped magnet, which generates a current when the copper disc is rotated.
|fame=19
|art=33
|fth=28
|civ=29
|tech=45
|ss1=Per 30 Fissure LVLs, Snail DEF +1<br>Fissure LVL: 1,200/1,200
|ss2=Per 30 Fissure LVLs, Snail DEF +2<br>Fissure LVL: 1,200/1,200
|ss3=Per 30 Fissure LVLs, Snail DEF +3<br>Fissure LVL: 1,200/1,200
|ss4=Per 30 Fissure LVLs, Snail DEF +5<br>Fissure LVL: 1,200/1,200
|ss7=Per 30 Fissure LVLs, Snail DEF +5<br>Fissure LVL: 1,200/1,200<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Timemachine skill I.png|50px]]Place in Time Machine: This Relic's TECH +5
}}

[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Fissure Boost]]
[[Category:Time Machine Skill]]
[[Category:TECH Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Lottery Bead Color Change]]
[[Category:Indigent Nobleman Relics]]
